problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Lattice-based. Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance directly addresses this.
